title: Elevated Ores
description: A mod that introduces an assortment of pretty decorative crystals, ores and stones!
body: Latest Update: PYRITE LAPIS AND RAINBOW OPAL ORE! ![Pyrite Lapis and Rainbow Opal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d54b68f4049f4d6d4b0fdbb3807ccd874bcb4b6.png) I ONLY post my newer mods and mod updates to Modrinth! If you see my mods being uploaded to other websites under my name, THAT IS AN IMPOSTER AND IT HAS BEEN DONE SO WITHOUT MY PERMISSION! PLEASE DO NOT REUPLOAD MY MODS TO OTHER WEBSITES!!! NEVER DOWNLOAD UNOFFICIAL REPOSTS OF MY MODS, AS I DO NOT ENDORSE THEM AND ESPECIALLY BECAUSE THEY COULD BE VIRUSES!!! The ONLY exception are mods hosted on Planet Minecraft with older versions of my mods as that is where I originally started out sharing them! Welcome to a simple, elegant decoration-focused ore mod! Each type of ore and stone spawns naturally, and can be used to craft their respective blocks, smoothed versions of these blocks, stairs, slabs, and walls, and even Countertops! This is a mod made specifically for builders and decorators, so I hope you can all draw all kinds of inspiration from it! Of course there's ALSO more ores and the like planned for the future, so hope you look forward to building with those too! There's also a handful of pickaxes one can build with some of the available stones, also mainly for aesthetic purposes! Planned Ores, Gems and Features (Subject to Change):Labradorite, Morganite, Quartz, Rainbow Quartz, Yellow Topaz, Alexandrite, Obsidian Shard, Pearls, Ender Pearl Blocks
